disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer |
body:
Friend,

I hope you will join me for our reception in Kirksville.

We are less than 60 days from Election Day, and I need your support now more than ever before. I'm being outspent by the opposition, and outside groups are doing everything they can to distort my record of doing what's right for Missouri.

The reception will be hosted by Vicki and Jay Benson at their home on Wednesday, September 21 at 5:30 PM.

Please RSVP online or by calling Alexis Greco at (314) 732-1549 if you plan to attend.

I look forward to seeing you there,

Chris

Vicki & Jay Benson

cordially invite you to

an evening reception with

Missouri Attorney General &

Candidate for Governor

Chris Koster

_______________

body:
The capabilities of Trump's campaign | Derek --

Here's the most important thing we've learned about the capabilities of Trump's campaign recently:

He now has the ability to raise at least $70 million each month from grassroots donors.

His diehard fans are fully committed and they make a lot of noise.

They're so engaged that one of his advisors is actually on the record saying, “When you look at what’s going on on the ground, there is much more support for Donald Trump than Hillary Clinton.”

That’s factually not true. We have more organizers, more field offices, more volunteers -- even more donors.

But if you just look at what his team raises month over month, we're a lot closer than I'm comfortable with.

**We can change that fact, Derek -- starting now. We can show the world that this team really is more dedicated than Trump’s supporters. We've set a goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of this month -- and we want to make a big dent before our mid-month deadline on Thursday by getting 5 new donors from your area today. If you make your first donation right now, we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY0NzY2NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxNzQ2NDAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Derek, we set a fundraising goal every day -- because we have a pretty good idea how much we need to raise every day to stay ahead of Trump. And too often, recently, we're not hitting those goals. If that trend continues, it sends a different kind of message -- one I really, really, really want to avoid.

Let’s get this done!

Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and join the 2.3 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

body:
We’re not letting Hillary get away with this. Help us now. |

Friend, We need your help. We’re launching an ad to fight back against Hillary’s disgusting comments made at a closed-door fundraiser Friday night. She called tens of millions of hard-working Americans “deplorable” people who don’t belong in her America. We need to raise $1,OOO,OOO in the next 24 hours to help get our ad up on the air. Contribute $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to help us push this far and wide. Who exactly was Hillary talking about when she made these despicable comments? The coal miners she vows to put out of business, the veterans dying while waiting for treatment, the police officers concerned about rising crime, the American citizens worried about an uncontrolled border, the workers who haven’t seen a raise in years... And what about the former and active duty military members who strongly support my father over Hillary? Are they “deplorable”? Because we don’t subscribe to Hillary’s elitist plan for America, she’s written off tens of millions of Americans as “deplorable.” You and I both know the media will try to sweep this under the rug as quickly as they can. But that’s why we need to act fast with a fundraising blitz to get this airing in states that will determine the fate of this election. Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to help us push this ad far and wide. Thanks, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Cecile Richards, Planned Parenthood Federal PAC
subject: Protecting Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello there,
I spend every day on the front lines of the fight to preserve women's right to access the full range of reproductive health care -- and Governor Maggie Hassan is right there with me.
She has always stood up for a woman's right to make her own health care decisions in New Hampshire, and I know she will continue to do so in the U.S. Senate. And her race is our best chance to take back the Senate and secure the future of the Supreme Court.

Last week I laid out ten simple, but tremendously important steps to STOP illegal immigration: |

Friend, because we’ve returned to the important issues that sparked our campaign, the polls now show that we will win the White House. Last week I laid out ten simple, but tremendously important steps to STOP illegal immigration: #1 BUILD THE WALL! #2 END “Catch and Release” #3 ZERO Tolerance for illegal aliens #4 ELIMINATE “sanctuary cities” #5 REVERSE Barack Obama’s illegal “executive amnesty” #6 SUSPEND visa issuance to risky countries #7 ENSURE foreign countries accept their deported citizens #8 COMPLETE biometric entry-exit visa program #9 ENFORCE E-Verify with employers #10 REFORM immigration to suit the best needs of the AMERICAN people But unless we win this election, we won’t even get the chance to enact these simple steps to stop illegal immigration. I’m asking you to take one simple step today: support Team TRUMP. Friend, America’s politicians have failed to end illegal immigration not because it’s too difficult, but because they lack the political will and courage to do what must be done. You and I have the will to get it done. And we WILL do it if I can get you to take the first step today. I need you to take that single step right now and show your support for my plans to once again make the well-being of the American people come FIRST: make a generous contribution of at least $25 to Team Trump today. Because I am proudly not a politician, I am not beholden to any special interests. I’ve spent a lot of money on my campaign, let me tell you, I write those checks -- nobody owns Trump. With your support, we will accomplish all of the ten steps, and when we do, peace, law, justice, and prosperity will prevail -- and we will Make America Great Again! Thank you, Friend -- please let me hear from you today! Sincerely, Donald J. Trump P.S. -- Friend, we will break the cycle of illegal immigration -- there will be NO amnesty! Our message to the world will be this: you cannot obtain legal status or become a citizen of the United States by illegally entering OUR country, period. Let’s get it done, Friend -- please support Team Trump now. Thanks again, Donald. Take One Simple Step: Support Team Trump TODAY

body:
We have incredible support and amazing momentum! Now we need to work overtime right through Election Day. Join us today! |

Friend,
We’ve kicked off another jam-packed week of travel and events, but I wanted to take a moment out to send a quick update on the campaign. With just eight weeks to go I could not be happier with where we are today, and now we need to continue working overtime right on through Election Day. Getting you involved is more crucial to our success than ever before. I’m sure you’ve seen the news, Friend. Through incredible grassroots support from friends like you and tireless hard work, we’re building huge momentum all across the country and rising in the polls. The sky is the limit, and we’re not letting up for a moment. The American people do not trust Crooked Hillary and the other career politicians at all – for good reason – and they are getting on board at a record pace to help us shake up Washington and Make America Great Again. Help us keep up the fight and WIN this historic election, by JOINING us with a $100, $75, $50, $35, $20 or $10 contribution today. JOIN THE FIGHT The building blocks to our success are clear. We have the right agenda to fix the toughest problems and create jobs and opportunity... we have the best supporters any campaign could ever hope for... and we are outworking our opponents every single day on the campaign trail. Just today we held a massive rally at the Baltimore Convention Center, where I spoke to thousands of dedicated supporters, and we have dozens of rallies and events planned for the weeks ahead. Our state Trump teams are doing incredible work on the ground, we’re set to hit the airwaves with hard-hitting new ads, and we’re preparing to invest massive additional resources into our groundbreaking digital efforts. We’re not letting up and I hope you won’t either – I need you standing with me right on through Election Day. JOIN THE FIGHT The American people are fed up with the rigged system and the dishonest liberal media that is covering for Crooked Hillary. And while we may be outspent by the liberal-left and the special interests in this election, we WILL NOT be outworked. That’s why I know we can win this race... but we cannot leave anything to chance, and we need everyone of our supporters to get involved now. Join our efforts today by following this secure link. Thank you!
Best wishes,

Donald J. Trump JOIN THE FIGHT

I know that we’ve been asking a lot of you lately, so I wanted to take a moment to explain exactly why we say that your donation matters more today than it will in a month’s time.

By the time we get to the end of September, folks in states like Wisconsin and Iowa will have already begun voting. We're setting a mid-month deadline because this is our last chance we’ll get to make critical decisions about how to fund get-out-the-vote operations.

Your donation matters because, given how tightly he’s held onto his money thus far, we think Donald Trump is plotting a media blitz in the coming weeks. He’s going to use every minute of airtime and every ounce of his sway with the media to slander Hillary, so we’ve _got_ to have enough in our wallet to counter the attacks in real time. This deadline will go a long way in telling us how forcefully we'll be able to respond.

And your donation is important because we need to build the most comprehensive, most effective ground game possible. If we want to reach every voter in Florida and Ohio, we need to hire enough organizers to pound every last stretch of battleground pavement, knock on every last door, and make sure every last voter realizes the unprecedented stakes of this race.

You know how important momentum is. You understand how crucial it is to be able to punch back. And you get that it all comes down to voter outreach. **So please, Derek -- help us reach our goal by chipping in for the first time right now. We’ll even throw in a free sticker to say thanks! We’ve got just 3 days, and what we do will help to determine what voters hear, who they hear from, and how many of them, in turn, are able to make their voices heard come November 8th:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY0ODQzNTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxODgyMDAzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks for being a rock for us,

Robby

I remember walking down Tucker Boulevard in St. Louis with my dad when I was a young boy.

But, today, St. Louis is too often plagued by gunfire and killings, and it has become one of the most dangerous cities in the country.

---
Dear Peter, I'll never forget my day at the Pentagon on 9/11. Immediately after the attack, I came upon Brian Birdwell, who was about 15-20 yards from the nose of the aircraft that penetrated into the building. I offered to hold his broken IV and pray with him as we escorted him to safety. I'll also never forget what happened 15 years later at the Republican National Convention. While we never got to exchange names during the ordeal, we were miraculously re-united:
---
---
[ ](https://u3600396.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=Ept3eUXUTOqi1x3JGzXRbVSivkyUolUcYmTxwyY-2B796MNRxBCelYii1E6mTmJC3O8zkezRHZjo-2FRJv49uRZv-2Fp94Z1vIt-2BLkyAZlm3BUyHI-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz0DCKsot10eGO4g1hWwNpsCOCBxq4llkdlSAzIFOJzxlEg-2BPugytJ6ui7m2Xa0yBBlHwX-2FQb6SQ7CdsZUqekzC2p2WTqzejupRzMfccNR1j-2F11RX5w3fyOIVoYOB-2FHRcJllHhtwSSCW0Rw08RRleqGHOcm6B7KL1QF8o9mRChfPh-2B437CqYWjqmO12KzBtZoeXMIXktvXJWGuedcSITjTKXw2O22HZyvrbiEIHZY9GuKBjK9sut1JmB4gehRU2g-2FeOjr8EkbMMeX1-2Ff6381z8ZKJoE5aSyMllRxuglyQlcOGlt-2FGkenSEUJuiN2diakRMvuFgwOIgAwFVgWmeb-2FUaIHXh-2FTxr5aYHgmC4xqTgdPrANR0kTsr7Z5bhzZoZroFe)
---
---
It was a sobering reminder of a mission I've carried with me since that day we were attacked. I left the Pentagon to find and eliminate those responsible as a combat squadron leader. When you elect me as your US Senator I'll lead the fight to eliminate Islamic Jihadis around the globe so this never happens again. [Will you join me?](https://u3600396.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=Ept3eUXUTOqi1x3JGzXRbXaG3KX5kcffEdOsQijnjeN094cJEtUlMiq48NPNAaRAALY5ykqfOICXjp9QuOSvZTvvkffPMQEzb-2FQQBVpl9dXTCOIpFzKlv1yz833GtXOYsFamp76FySiU7FBy3SQNLg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz0DCKsot10eGO4g1hWwNpsCOCBxq4llkdlSAzIFOJzxlEg-2BPugytJ6ui7m2Xa0yBBlHwX-2FQb6SQ7CdsZUqekzC2p2WTqzejupRzMfccNR1j-2F11RX5w3fyOIVoYOB-2FHRcJllHhtwSSCW0Rw08RRleqGBsyBXwn99xlJqYj2vhJp4j1yGpvH68vkziSW9lBw6HWNdprZtMdSKgU1AEA2u9V-2FRcyR-2B4J6w0XUFfb27uLbL572h4CT-2B1bXpLRMxXewKzDAW1csr6IO0bp-2BUwWE0T5kK6e86356C6WwygOWXzq-2FepOCq9BAVtSTLyxy619kxcvc6OiMNXVgFWSg30YT7NSg1zHIMkRbzNCoXh54EnZ1oWmDaTnybszZetzCR-2BMeO0m) Sincerely, Col. Rob Maness [**PS: Don 't forget, we'll be picking a winner for our Food and Firearms giveaway tonight. clean_body: | | | | Dear Peter, I'll never forget my day at the Pentagon on 9/11. Immediately after the attack, I came upon Brian Birdwell, who was about 15-20 yards from the nose of the aircraft that penetrated into the building. I offered to hold his broken IV and pray with him as we escorted him to safety. I'll also never forget what happened 15 years later at the Republican National Convention. While we never got to exchange names during the ordeal, we were miraculously re-united: It was a sobering reminder of a mission I've carried with me since that day we were attacked. I left the Pentagon to find and eliminate those responsible as a combat squadron leader. When you elect me as your US Senator I'll lead the fight to eliminate Islamic Jihadis around the globe so this never happens again. Sincerely, Col. Rob Maness | | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLONEL ROB MANESS Friends of Colonel Rob Maness · United States

name: Evan Bayh
subject: My position on trade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5048b/7be36b49/1efd02d7/78f89af4/4084102924/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

One of the main reasons I'm running for Senate is to support Hoosier workers and businesses -- and that means protecting them against bad trade deals.

I'll be very clear about my position: **I 'm against any new trade deals until we start enforcing the ones already on the books.** We have to ensure an even playing field for our workers and business owners.

Right now, that playing field is anything but even. For instance, we lose about $200 billion a year when other countries allow America's intellectual property to be stolen.

We make quality products here in America, but when other countries cheat, they undercut our goods, our businesses, and our workers. It isn't right -- and Congress must stand up to it.

**[Add your name if you agree that Congress must oppose more trade deals until we make existing agreements more fair for American workers and companies.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5048b/7be36b49/1efd02d7/78f89afb/4084102924/VEsE/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-evan-for-fair-trade")**

Indiana has been hit especially hard by outsourcing from companies like Carrier. I was disappointed to learn that my opponent took campaign cash from a Carrier executive **even after they laid off thousands of Hoosier workers to move their jobs to Mexico** , and has been an advocate of trade with no protections whatsoever for Hoosier workers.

You can bet that as Senator, I'm going to fight to eliminate tax breaks for companies that ship jobs away, and make sure that our workers have Trade Adjustment Assistance to fall back on if they lose their jobs.

It's the fair thing to do.

**[Add your name if you think Congress must take action to protect our workers and companies by fixing our current trade agreements before agreeing to any new deals.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5048b/7be36b49/1efd02d7/78f89afb/4084102924/VEsF/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-evan-for-fair-trade")**

Best,

Evan ******[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5048b/7be36b49/1efd02d7/78f89afa/4084102924/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=20160912a&amount=25")******

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We've put together a memo for insiders on the state of this campaign, and I wanted to make sure you have a chance to read it.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202446/2fde7c66/40a9202e/156a9ede/2166204746/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-general?utm_campaign=fnd_memo_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160912_fnd_gq_memo_ful__tn")
---
Friends, With less than 60 days, this race is heating up fast. We've put together a memo for insiders on the state of this campaign, and I wanted to make sure you have a chance to read it. **[But before you do, will you chip in $5 or more to help us stay on track?](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202446/2fde7c66/40a9202e/156a9ede/2166204746/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-general?utm_campaign=fnd_memo_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160912_fnd_gq_memo_ful__tn")** Thanks so much, Trey | | [**Chip in ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202446/2fde7c66/40a9202e/156a9ede/2166204746/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-general?utm_campaign=fnd_memo_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160912_fnd_gq_memo_ful__tn")
---

* * *

**FROM:** Trey Nix, Campaign Manager, Cooper for North Carolina
**RE:** State Of The Race For Governor
We are now less than 60 days away from Election Day and Attorney General Roy Cooper is in a strong position to win. Throughout 2015 and 2016, Attorney General Cooper has consistently outraised Governor Pat McCrory. The campaign entered July 1 with a $3.1 million cash on hand advantage. A number that is likely to have increased since the last public report, considering it has grown each time prior.
Governor McCrory has repeatedly been rated as one of the most vulnerable incumbents in the country, and it's easy to see why.
Over 2016 the race remained deadlocked, but in the last 6 weeks Roy Cooper has taken the lead in multiple public polls showing that Governor McCrory's negative favorability and job ratings are finally catching up to him in the vote.
This lead also coincides with our campaign having the ability to communicate before Governor McCrory. For the last month, both campaigns and the Republican Governors Association have been on TV. Yet, Governor McCrory has been unable to move his polling numbers.
Why has he struggled? It could be the economic losses from House Bill 2, multiple pay-to-play scandals, the fact that teachers are leaving the state because of an underfunded education system, or it could be because working families haven't felt the economic recovery that Governor McCrory has tried to claim credit for.
The bottom line is North Carolina voters are not buying what Governor McCrory is selling.
**_Fundraising_**
In the second period of 2016, Roy Cooper raised an unprecedented $5.12 million and reported $9.4 million cash on hand. In total, Cooper has raised a historic $12.7 million, more at this point in the campaign than any other gubernatorial race in North Carolina history.
During the last reporting period, more than 15,000 individuals donated to Roy Cooper--totaling 26,000 donors to the campaign so far--and more than 11,000 donations were $100 or less. In addition, 92 percent of Cooper's donors are North Carolinians.
**_Polling_**
In all polling from the last month, Cooper has shown a growing lead. Just last week, a new Quinnipiac University poll showed Roy Cooper ahead of Governor McCrory by 7 points, 51-44. The Real Clear Politics average of polls shows Cooper with a 6% advantage.
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202446/2fde7c66/40a9202e/156a9ede/2166204746/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-general?utm_campaign=fnd_memo_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160912_fnd_gq_memo_ful__tn")
Also last week, Sabato's Crystal Ball, a widely-respected and nonpartisan publication of the University of Virginia Center For Politics, moved the North Carolina governor's race from a "toss-up" to "leans Democratic." This is a major shift for a race that was listed as "leans Republican" as recently as April.
**_Voter Outreach_**
Not only has Cooper consistently outraised Governor McCrory, but Democrats also have a stronger ground game. While North Carolina Democrats are building a strong voter turnout organization, the Trump campaign doesn't have a single office open in the state.
A memo recently released by Hillary For America highlights the difference:
> "In addition to the state's 15 electoral votes, Democrats are working to elect Roy Cooper as Governor, Deborah Ross as U.S. Senator, and win several key seats in the state legislature. To achieve all of these goals, we've opened 30 coordinated campaign offices. We have engaged more than 300,000 North Carolinians in the campaign, and signed up more than 40,000 people to volunteer for the campaign."
**_The Choice_**
Since day one, we have said this election would be about who can bring jobs to North Carolina and improve the economy for working families. Governor McCrory has been claiming credit for the "Carolina Comeback" while working families have been asking - a comeback for whom? The truth is, it's only those at the top who have made a comeback under Governor McCrory.
Under Governor McCrory, North Carolina has lagged behind the economic growth of the rest of the country. Wages are stagnant, the cost of college is skyrocketing, we're not attracting enough high paying jobs, and our schools are starved for resources. And many teachers are leaving for better pay and more respect.
Despite this reality, Governor McCrory's core argument for reelection has been based on his purported jobs record. What was already a tough sell has become much harder with a growing list of economic fallout from House Bill 2. It's now more clear than ever that Governor McCrory is putting his partisan political agenda ahead of the best interests of working families.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: A little long but very important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
This is an important email, sisters and brothers, about how we stop the disastrous Trans Pacific Partnership trade deal.
It may be a little longer than your normal email, but we think it's very important that everyone understands both what's at stake with TPP and how we can actually win.
We're going to ask you in this email to [**step up and declare that you oppose TPP**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stop_tpp?source=em160912-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stop_tpp?source=em160912-full"), and the reason we're asking is so that we can give you more opportunities this week to speak out and oppose TPP. But we still think it's very important for you to understand exactly what we're facing in order to win. Here's what you need to know.
**President Obama is the one person who can start the process to pass TPP.**
Last year President Obama sought, and won, approval from Congress to "fast track" trade deals. That means that he can submit the TPP to Congress and put it up for a vote without any amendments. Congress can approve it as-is, or reject it. That's it.
Legally, today is the first day that President Obama can do this. He's said before that he would like to pass TPP in the lame duck session. We don't know if he's going to try this week, next week, or after the election, but we need to be ready to stop it in case he does try.
**If President Obama does force a vote, realistically our best chance at defeating TPP is in the House of Representatives.**
The reality of how the fast track process works is that TPP can't be amended -- not a single word. It's also true that TPP can't be filibustered in the Senate. It just needs 50 votes if President Obama decides to submit it to Congress.
We know that Bernie Sanders will oppose TPP, but the same can't be said for many other members of the Senate. If TPP comes up in the Senate, it's likely it will pass. It's not great, but that's what we're facing.
**Our best chance to defeat TPP is in the House of Representatives.** If we can get a majority of members of Congress to vote no on TPP, we can win. So we must focus our efforts there.
**Wednesday is a national day of action focusing on the House of Representatives to stop TPP.**
For years, a big coalition of labor, environmental, trade, and other groups has worked to stop TPP. Together these groups have millions of members who have spoken out, made phone calls, lobbied politicians, and done everything they can to stop TPP.
All of these groups and all of their members - including Our Revolution - are **building towards a huge day of actionthis Wednesday focused on the House of Representatives.**
Our goal is to place at least 50,000 calls to members of Congress and their offices on Wednesday. With your help, we're going to help lead this fight and find out where these representatives stand on TPP, and we're going to do everything we can to make sure that they know the people they represent want to defeat TPP.
**We can only win if all of us get involved to stop TPP.**
**If TPP passes, there's no going back.** The only way to get out of the trade deal - even to change a single word! - is if every one of the 12 nations agree. That's not going to happen. So we need to defeat TPP now.
Big corporate interests and Wall Street are lining up to help TPP pass Congress when President Obama starts the fast track process. We've proven before that when enough people stand together, we can beat those special interests. **Now we need to do it again, starting with our day of actionon Wednesday to reach our goal of 50,000 calls to Congress.**
**Sisters and Brothers, this is what we need you to do:**
The first step to stopping TPP is showing a huge number of people oppose it. Members of Congress and the media need to know that millions of people want to stop this trade deal.
[**Add your name and say that you want to stop TPP and have your voice counted.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stop_tpp?source=em160912-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stop_tpp?source=em160912-full")
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stop_tpp?source=em160912-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stop_tpp?source=em160912-full")**
Thanks for all you do for our movement. We'll be in touch soon about how else you can help stop TPP.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Former President, Communication Workers of America
Chair of the Board, Our Revolution
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stop-the_tpp?refcode=em160912-tpp "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stop-the_tpp?refcode=em160912-tpp")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION

NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE COMMITTEE.

OUR REVOLUTION IS A 501(C)(4) ORGANIZATION. CONTRIBUTIONS TO OUR REVOLUTION ARE NOT DEDUCTIBLE AS CHARITABLE CONTRIBUTIONS FOR FEDERAL INCOME TAX PURPOSES.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002 | (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").
